name: marketingskills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the marketingskills capability.

prompts.name: seo_optimization_prompt
prompts.template: Analyze the following text for SEO opportunities and suggest improvements: {text_content}
prompts.use_case: Automated generation and optimization of marketing copy for digital campaigns

prompts.name: copywriting_improvement_prompt
prompts.template: Generate persuasive marketing copy to increase conversion rates for this product: {campaign_parameters}
prompts.use_case: Improving conversion rates through AI-assisted CRO methodologies

prompts.name: analytics_insights_prompt
prompts.template: Based on this analytics data, provide a performance report and suggest growth strategies: {analytics_data}
prompts.use_case: Enhancing SEO strategies with machine-generated keyword and content suggestions
